creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
- Originally reported here: https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2017-March/107859.html .
- Also seen in the arm64 job, starting here: https://ci.freebsd.org/job/FreeBSD-head-aarch64-build/1433/console .

The OP reported that they needed to downgrade the port version in order for the arm64 cross-compilation to go through.
